stocks.impact_theory: Ramp up in cyberterrorism amid Iran war tensions, Cramer endorsement, Trump $15B cyber budget. Economic: boosts defense spending, contracts for cyber firms. Psych: fear drives safe-haven buying in cyber stocks while broad market sells off. Parallels: post-2021 SolarWinds hack rally in cyber. Analogies: Like buying fire insurance during wildfire season; armoring tanks before battle.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X sentiment highly positive with +20% mentions, web news on cyber attacks, Cramer call; outperforms market down 1-2%.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +10-15% gains in 1-2 weeks on contract wins.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if de-escalation; potential -5% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical de-escalation reduces urgency; high valuation vulnerable to rotation.

stocks.justification: Strong X buzz, Cramer, policy support align with historical cyber rallies.

stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA partnership on Sovereign AI OS reference architecture announced. Economic: accelerates AI infra deals, esp gov't sovereign AI. Psych: breakout charts fuel FOMO. Parallels: 2023 AI boom post-ChatGPT. Analogies: Like Ford partnering with Tesla on EVs; building the OS for AI factories.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts on cup/handle breakout, NVDA collab; positive sentiment amid tech dip.

stocks.impact_theory: Cyber strategy budget, Iran cyber threats boost sector. Economic: increased enterprise/gov spending. Psych: defensive play in turmoil. Parallels: Ukraine war cyber surge 2022. Analogies: Lifeboats on Titanic; antivirus in virus outbreak.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X shows +12% gains, sector leader in posts.

stocks.impact_theory: PLTR partnership positive, but bubble fears, stochastic bear cross, market selloff. Economic: AI demand strong but valuation strain. Psych: profit-taking. Parallels: 2000 dotcom. Analogies: Overinflated balloon; Ferrari in traffic jam.
